lore.english:
An executive of UFS's DSO. Undercover as the owner of the club "Persona" in Tokyo Kingdom and supervises Koukawa Asuka.

Koukawa Oboro is her true identity. A collateral relative of the prestigious Koukawa clan, so a relative of Asuka. The Koukawa clan was annihilated by Nomad, under the command of Edwin Black. She was defeated by Black and subjected to forced cybernetic modification. However, her mind narrowly escaped. Now, in pursuit of vengeance, she secretly collaborates with the DSO to protect Asuka from the shadows.

She is a practitioner of the secret ninja art, Husk Art – Mind Shift, a technique that allows her to transfer her consciousness into another body. It was through this forbidden art that she escaped certain death.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Taimanin Art: Oni Slash[-]
skills.description:
Slashes the enemy upwards with a dagger, and then stabs downwards, attacking the enemy 2 times in total.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:780102]%)[-] [&Bleeding] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:780102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:780102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Taimanin Art: Uprising Storm[-]
skills.description:
Swings the blade wildly to attack the enemy 8 times.
Performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:780202]%)[-] [&Bleeding] [&Common_Word_Skill_DotBuffBurst] attack.
Killing an enemy with this skill inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:780203]%)[-] [&AtkDown] to [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:780203]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:780203] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Sharp Blade Dance[-]
skills.description:
Hacks the enemy with daggers in both hands and deals DMG [A:7803] time(s) after finishing.
If the target has [&Bleeding], steals [V3:780302] [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&Buff](s) the target has.
If the target has [&Bleeding], each [&Bleeding] increases [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:780303]%)[-].
